name: Carrot-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, nonfat dry milk powder, baking powder, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
2. Cream the solid shortening with brown sugar until well blended.
3. Add molasses to the creamed mixture; beat in the egg.
4. Stir in the shredded carrots and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, mixing until just combined.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Let cool on a wire rack.
